Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.pp
This package contains pretty-printing functionality used by the GUI and for saving proofs.
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule
This package contains classes for implementing rules.

    class containing a pair of SchemaVariables, the first one being a TermSV, the second one a FormulaSV, representing a "c new depending on phi" statement within a varcond of a taclet
